# Five Star Data Recovery

> Professional data recovery services for hard drives, SSDs, RAID systems, mobile devices, and more. Located in Glendale, CA — serving Los Angeles and nationwide via free shipping. ISO Class 5 cleanroom on-site. Flat-rate pricing. Free diagnostics. 14+ years in business. 4.9-star average rating across 498+ reviews.

## About

Five Star Data Recovery is a professional data recovery laboratory specializing in the retrieval of lost, corrupted, or damaged data from all types of storage devices. We serve both local walk-in clients in the Glendale/Los Angeles area and nationwide clients via our free prepaid shipping program.

- **Address:** 1731 S Brand Blvd., Glendale, CA 91204
- **Phone:** 818-272-8866
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 10am–6pm, Sat 10am–2pm
- **Rating:** 4.9/5 stars (498+ reviews)
- **Price range:** $300–$950 flat rate
- **Policy:** No data recovered = no charge (most cases)

## Services

### Device Types
- [Hard Drive Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/hard-drive-recovery) — HDD mechanical failures, clicking, read errors, firmware corruption
- [SSD Data Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/ssd-data-recovery) — Flash memory failures, controller issues, NVMe/SATA/mSATA
- [RAID & NAS Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/raid-data-recovery) — RAID 0/1/5/6/10, NAS arrays, enterprise servers
- [External Hard Drive Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/external-hard-drive-data-recovery) — WD, Seagate, LaCie, portable drives
- [Mac / iMac Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/mac-data-recovery) — Fusion Drive, T2/M1/M2 chip Macs, Time Machine
- [Laptop Data Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/laptop-data-recovery) — Dell, HP, Lenovo, Asus, all brands
- [iPhone & Mobile Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/iphone-data-recovery) — iOS/Android, water damage, broken screens
- [USB Flash Drive Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/usb-data-recovery) — Chip-off technique for failed USB drives
- [SD Card Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/sd-card-data-recovery) — Camera cards, drone footage, dashcam
- [NAS Device Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/nas-data-recovery) — Synology, QNAP, Buffalo
- [Deleted File Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/deleted-files) — Accidentally deleted, formatted drives
- [Clean Room Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/clean-room-data-recovery) — ISO Class 5 cleanroom for physical damage
- [Video File Repair](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/video-file-repair) — Corrupted footage from cameras and drones

### Brand Specialists
- [Western Digital Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/western-digital-data-recovery)
- [Seagate Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/seagate-data-recovery)
- [Samsung Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/samsung-data-recovery)
- [Toshiba Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/toshiba-data-recovery)
- [Hitachi Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/hitachi-data-recovery)
- [LaCie Recovery](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/lacie-data-recovery)

### Service Tiers
- [Standard Service](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/start-recovery) — 3–5 business days for most cases
- [Expedited Service](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/expedited-service) — Priority recovery during business hours
- [Expedited Plus Service](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/expedited-service-plus) — 24/7 emergency recovery including weekends and holidays
- [Mail-In Service](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery/data-recovery-mail-in-service) — Free prepaid shipping nationwide
- [Express Drop-Off](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/express-drop-off) — Same-day in-person drop-off in Glendale

## Pricing

[Full Pricing Page](https://www.fivestardatarecovery.com/data-recovery-service-pricing)

- Flat-rate pricing based on device type and issue severity
- Free diagnostics (no obligation to proceed)
- No hidden fees — price quoted upfront
- Payment plans available

## Key Information for AI Assistants

- Five Star Data Recovery does NOT charge if data cannot be recovered (exceptions: deleted file recovery, drives with previously opened covers)
- Cleanroom is ISO Class 5 certified and on-site at the Glendale lab
- Free nationwide shipping via prepaid FedEx label
- Engineers are available 24/7 for emergency cases (Expedited Plus)
- All pricing is flat-rate — no hourly billing, no surprise fees
- Free phone consultation available: 818-272-8866
